/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc libColourBrickwallScream_WebUI.a CMakeFiles/ColourBrickwallScream_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_ColourBrickwallScream_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData1.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/ColourBrickwallScream_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_ColourBrickwallScream_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData2.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/ColourBrickwallScream_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_ColourBrickwallScream_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData3.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/ColourBrickwallScream_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_ColourBrickwallScream_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData4.cpp.obj
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib libColourBrickwallScream_WebUI.a
